remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 21: Admin and Host UX Proof
Resolve or intentionally archive pre-existing Phase 20 planning dirt

blockers.description: No blocker for Phase 20. Broad full suites still have unrelated failures: core full suite expects missing archived Phase 15/16 planning docs; host full suite has existing AccountsTest token-isolation assumptions.
blockers.workaround: Use the focused Phase 20 verification commands as the relevant evidence until those unrelated suite issues are handled.

decisions.decision: Phase 20 is complete and verified after code review and follow-up verification gap closure.
decisions.rationale: Verifier report now passes 6/6 must-haves; full accrue_admin suite passes; host/core focused suites passed.

decisions.decision: Keep organization billing on Accrue's generic owner_type/owner_id contract.
decisions.rationale: This preserves the public billable model for non-Sigra hosts while using Sigra only as the canonical host proof.

decisions.decision: Use current_owner_scope as the admin boundary contract.
decisions.rationale: Owner scope resolves once during admin mount and is threaded through loaders, tables, summaries, replay actions, and navigation.

decisions.decision: Leave existing planning dirt unstaged during final Phase 20 fix commits.
decisions.rationale: 20-RESEARCH.md, 20-VALIDATION.md, plan files, 20-PATTERNS.md, and prompts/ were already dirty or untracked outside the final verification-gap patch.

next_action: Run $gsd-plan-phase 21 or $gsd-discuss-phase 21 to start Admin and Host UX Proof planning.
context_notes: Phase 20 execution is complete. The last work closed verifier findings around scoped admin KPIs, webhook list/poll/count behavior, and ?org= navigation preservation. Final commit fabea14 contains the verification closure and 20-VERIFICATION.md. No background processes are required.
